Batman (1989)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $251,188,924Details
International Box Office $160,160,000
Worldwide Box Office $411,348,924
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$40,489,746 (16.1% of total gross)
Legs:6.20 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:61.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$35,000,000 (worldwide box office is 11.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,194 opening theaters/2,201 max. theaters, 13.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $715,506,622

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: June 23rd, 1989 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
International Releases: August 25th, 1989 (Wide) (Australia)
July 7th, 1990 (Wide) (South Korea)
May 17th, 2019 (Limited), released as Batman (4K Restoration) (United Kingdom)
December 16th, 2021 (Wide) (New Zealand)
September 16th, 2023 (Limited) (Batman Day) (United Kingdom)
Video Release: October 7th, 1997 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13
Running Time: 121 minutes
Franchise: Batman
Cast, crew, or production detail: Visual Effects
Character Appearance: Batman
Plot point: Investigative Journalist, Revenge, Vigilante
Social setting: Film Noir, Organized Crime
Source material: D.C. Comics
Subgenre: Action Adventure
Source:Based on Comic/Graphic Novel
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Super Hero
Production/Financing Companies: Guber-Peters, Warner Bros.
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Opening Weekend:$40,489,746 (16.1% of total gross)
Legs:6.20 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:61.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$35,000,000 (worldwide box office is 11.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,194 opening theaters/2,201 max. theaters, 13.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $715,506,622

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: June 23rd, 1989 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
International Releases: August 25th, 1989 (Wide) (Australia)
July 7th, 1990 (Wide) (South Korea)
May 17th, 2019 (Limited), released as Batman (4K Restoration) (United Kingdom)
December 16th, 2021 (Wide) (New Zealand)
September 16th, 2023 (Limited) (Batman Day) (United Kingdom)
Video Release: October 7th, 1997 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13
Running Time: 121 minutes
Franchise: Batman
Cast, crew, or production detail: Visual Effects
Character Appearance: Batman
Plot point: Investigative Journalist, Revenge, Vigilante
Social setting: Film Noir, Organized Crime
Source material: D.C. Comics
Subgenre: Action Adventure
Source:Based on Comic/Graphic Novel
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Super Hero
Production/Financing Companies: Guber-Peters, Warner Bros.
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
